name: Existence check for wiki/docs/ pages before creation
description: Before creating ANY new page in wiki/docs/, agent MUST scan existing files in wiki/docs/ and match by entity/project name. If an existing docs page is found for this entity → UPDATE it (step_8b), do NOT create a duplicate.

step_1_extract_entity_name.description: From source document, extract the primary entity/project being documented
method: Read frontmatter sources field — if contains wiki/entities/<name>.md → extract <name>
If no wiki entities reference → parse source content for project/entity name (e.g., 'Loomana', 'Symfony', 'Pi')
Apply naming convention prefix: entity_name → lowercase-slug (e.g., Loomana → loom, Symfony → symfony)

step_2_scan_existing_docs.description: Scan wiki/docs/ for existing pages matching the extracted name
step_2_scan_existing_docs.command_pattern: ls wiki/docs/<prefix>-*.md | grep '<prefix>' OR find wiki/docs/ -name '<prefix>*' -type f

step_3_route_decision.description: If existing page found → route to UPDATE. If not found → proceed to CREATE.

routing_table.instruction: Agent sees: wiki/docs/<prefix>-<name>.md EXISTS. DO NOT create new page. MUST read existing, compare content with source, UPDATE if new facts/updates needed.

comparison_contract.action: SKIP - source already captured, no update needed

routing_table.instruction: Agent creates new wiki/docs/<prefix>-<name>.md following naming conventions.

before_create_docs_page: BEFORE writing any file to wiki/docs/, agent MUST execute existence check:
2. Scan wiki/docs/ for existing files matching prefix: ls wiki/docs/<prefix>-*.md OR find wiki/docs/ -name '<prefix>*'
3. IF found: DO NOT create new page — route to step_8b_update_page, read existing, compare, update
4. IF not found: proceed with step_8a_new_page creation
prohibited_actions: Agent MUST NOT guess/create wiki/docs/<name>.md without checking for existing files first
Agent MUST NOT create duplicate pages in wiki/docs/ (e.g., loom-architecture.md AND loom-architecture.md for same entity)
Agent MUST NOT skip existence check — this is a HARD pre-condition before step_8a

when_existing_page_found.instruction: Compare source document content vs existing wiki page — identify NEW facts, updates, corrections
If source contains new info → UPDATE wiki page (preserve old_info + append '## Updated [date]'). If source already fully captured → SKIP creation

case_1_existing_found.decision: EXISTING FOUND → read wiki/docs/loom-architecture.md, compare with docs/architecture.md, UPDATE if new facts needed
case_1_existing_found.wrong_action: Create wiki/docs/loom-architecture.md as NEW page — WRONG (duplicate for same entity)

case_2_no_existing.scenario: Ingest docs/troubleshooting.md for Loomana (no troubleshooting page exists yet)
case_2_no_existing.decision: NO EXISTING → create wiki/docs/loom-troubleshooting.md as NEW page

case_3_already_captured.scenario: Ingest docs/memory-hooks.md (already fully captured in wiki/docs/loom-memory-hooks.md)
case_3_already_captured.decision: EXISTING FOUND → read wiki/docs/loom-memory-hooks.md, compare with docs/memory-hooks.md. If source already fully captured → SKIP creation
